name: Goguma Chilge Muchim (Sweet Potato Vine & Mushroom Stir-fry)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Sweet potato vine; cut into three-inch lengths
1/4 lb Mushrooms, fresh/meaty; caps only, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the corn oil in a wok or skillet.
2. Add the sweet potato vine and mushrooms, and stir-fry over moderate heat for 1 minute.
3. Add the garlic, carrot, salt, and Korean sesame oil.
4. Stir-fry for an additional 8 to 10 minutes until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
5. Serve warm or at room temperature. Serves 4.
